author: @frankbenevolence
text: I think you are confusing science and economics.  Science is to understand, economics and politics are for control. Understanding how to work with nature  is also science.

author: @AlienLivesMatter
text:
Control is a good thing if the underlying assumptions are sound. In reality it isn't.

Just like the PfizerAIDS and excess deaths. Jab induced syndrome of aquired immune deficiency is observed by diminished t.cell outcome.

author: @anveshas1306
text: Great video! I had an important question though regarding copper inks. After you inspired me to begin my adventure in conductive inks, I was having issues making a graphene copper ink. I bought copper powder that is 325 mesh or 44 micrometers and the problem is, my sample gets very varied values of conductivity when u place the probes in diffferent areas. This is even the case in 60 minutes of sonification. I really dont know what I am doing wrong and would appreicate some help @Robert Murray-Smith

author: @ArtDecooe
text:
Yes. Natural energy exchange is a kind of synergy between locations.
An harmonic process in energy exchange has less force but efficiency is higher. 
So perhaps it is less energy amount with less loss. 
Sounds like a harmony and harmonic resonance can contain more energy in the same moment, if the sweet spot of resonance is found.
